zh.lifeSummary: 當John Deiville於1276年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾艾格曼東時，他的父親Sir John d'Eiville Knight37歲，母親Maud James Daudelegh31歲。他於大約1302年與Margaret Agnes在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他去世於1326年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Deiville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Déville in Seine-Maritime.

nickname from Middle English devel ‘devil’ (Old English dēofol). This may have been acquired as a pageant name or as a shortened form of a longer nickname such as that of Robert and William Drepedevel (‘kill the devil’), recorded in the 1301 Subsidy Rolls (Sutton Howgrave, in Kirklington, North Yorkshire).

variants.name: Dewell
meanings: variant of Deaville , a nickname from Middle English devel (Old English dēofol) ‘devil, Satan’, possibly acquired as a pageant name or as a shortened form of a longer nickname. Compare Devall and Deeble .

of Breton origin, a variant of Joel from the Old Breton personal name Iudhael. The personal name was seemingly reintroduced into Britain from France in the 17th century by Huguenots, and was common in Devon and Cornwall and the Breton districts of Yorkshire and the eastern counties.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When John Deiville was born in 1276, in Egmanton, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Sir John d'Eiville Knight, was 37 and his mother, Maud James Daudelegh, was 31. He married Margaret Agnes about 1302, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1326, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

Il a épousé Margaret Agnes environ 1302, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1326, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Deiville родился в 1276 г. в местности эгмантон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John d'Eiville Knight было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud James Daudelegh, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Agnes около 1302 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1326 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.
